questions.question: Ratio is defined as

options.B: Comparison of two or more quantities of the same kind by addition
options.C: Comparison of two or more quantities of the same kind by division
options.D: Comparison of quantities having different units

questions.explanation: Ratio is the comparison of two or more quantities of the same kind by division.

questions.question: While forming a ratio, the quantities must be
questions.explanation: The units must be the same to compare quantities in a ratio.

questions.question: If A : B = 2 : 5, then
questions.explanation: If A : B = 2 : 5, then B/A = 5/2 = 2.5, so B is 2.5 times A.

questions.question: The duplicate ratio of 4 : 7 is
questions.explanation: Duplicate ratio is obtained by squaring each term: 4² : 7² = 16 : 49

questions.question: The triplicate ratio of 2 : 3 is
questions.explanation: Triplicate ratio is obtained by cubing each term: 2³ : 3³ = 8 : 27

questions.question: The sub-duplicate ratio of 9 : 16 is
questions.explanation: Sub-duplicate ratio is obtained by taking square root: √9 : √16 = 3 : 4

questions.question: The sub-triplicate ratio of 8 : 27 is
questions.explanation: Sub-triplicate ratio is obtained by taking cube root: ∛8 : ∛27 = 2 : 3

questions.question: The inverse ratio of 5 : 11 is
questions.explanation: Inverse ratio is obtained by interchanging the terms: 5 : 11 → 11 : 5

questions.question: Convert the fractional ratio 3/5 : 2/3 into a simple ratio
Which of the following represents a proportion?
